revision.comment: Bot: remove [[Category:Disambiguation pages]] (crud category cleanup) [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24608848913|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:花園稲荷神社]]
'''Hanazono Inari Shrine''' (花園稲荷神社) is a {{ill|Shinto shrine|en|Shinto shrine|qid=Q845945|lt=Shinto shrine|1=Shinto shrine}} located within Ueno Park.
* {{ill|Gojō_Tenjin_Shrine_(Taitō-ku)|lt=Gojō Tenjin Shrine and Hanazono Inari Shrine|ja|五條天神社 (台東区)#花園稲荷神社|lt=Gojō Tenjin Shrine and Hanazono Inari Shrine|qq=Gojo Tenjin Shrine (Tokyo)|1=Gojo_Tenjin_Shrine_(Tokyo)#Hanazono_Inari_Shrine|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gojō_Tenjin_Shrine_(Taitō-ku)|13=User:Immanuelle/Gojo_Tenjin_Shrine_(Tokyo)#Hanazono_Inari_Shrine|qq=}} - Situated in {{ill|Taitō|en|Taitō|qid=Q232641|lt=Taitō City|1=Taitō}}, {{ill|Tokyo|en|Tokyo|qid=Q1490|lt=Tokyo Metropolis|1=Tokyo}}. A subordinate shrine under the management of Gojō Tenjin Shrine, located adjacent to it. * {{ill|Hanazono Shrine|en|Hanazono Shrine|qid=Q3126680|lt=Hanazono Shrine|1=Hanazono Shrine}} - Located in {{ill|Shinjuku|en|Shinjuku|qid=Q179645|lt=Shinjuku City|1=Shinjuku}}, Tokyo. The former name of Hanazono Shrine.
{{disambiguation}}
{{translated page|ja|花園稲荷神社|version=101942052|comment=Imported full ja history}}
[[ja:花園稲荷神社]]
